metadata.description: AI-native PM operating system. 6 coordinated agents with persistent product context, quality gates, and cross-agent workflows.

plugins.name: pm-brain
plugins.description: PM Chief of Staff — command hub and orchestration layer. All 10 slash commands live here. Routes to specialists, manages context, enforces quality.

plugins.name: pm-strategist
plugins.description: Strategy skills: competitive analysis, market assessment, business models, pricing, positioning. No commands — invoked through /strategy.

plugins.name: pm-discoverer
plugins.description: Discovery skills: user research, assumption testing, opportunity mapping, experiment design, feature prioritization. No commands — invoked through /discover.

plugins.name: pm-executor
plugins.description: Execution skills: PRDs, OKRs, roadmaps, sprints, user stories, stakeholder management, technical specs, AI PM. No commands — invoked through /build.

plugins.name: pm-growth
plugins.description: Growth skills: GTM strategy, launch planning, growth loops, positioning, battlecards, PLG, retention. No commands — invoked through /launch.

plugins.name: pm-analyst
plugins.description: Analytics skills: metrics definition, SQL generation, A/B test analysis, cohort analysis, experiment design, instrumentation. No commands — invoked through /measure.
